CustomField.formula:
IF(AND(ISBLANK(Lead_Converted_date__c),NOT(ISBLANK( Date_Changed_to_Disqualified__c ))) , Date_Changed_to_Disqualified__c - Date_Changed_to_SQL__c, IF(AND(ISBLANK(Date_Changed_to_Disqualified__c),NOT(ISBLANK(Lead_Converted_date__c))) , Lead_Converted_date__c - Date_Changed_to_SQL__c,
TODAY() - Date_Changed_to_SQL__c ))
CustomField.label: Days as SQL
